mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLACE_WISHLIST ( WISH_MBR_ID, WISH_PLC_NO, WISH_REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{wishMbrId}, #{wishPlcNo}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT w.WISH_NO AS wishNo, w.WISH_PLC_NO AS wishPlcNo, w.WISH_REG_DATE AS wishRegDate, p.PLC_NAME AS plcName, p.PLC_ADDR AS plcAddr, p.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl, p.PLC_FLT_CD AS plcFltCd, p.PLC_CAT_CD AS plcCatCd, p.PLC_AVG_RATING AS plcAvgRating, p.PLC_REVIEW_CNT AS plcReviewCnt, r.RGN_NAME AS rgnName FROM PLACE_WISHLIST w JOIN PLACE p ON w.WISH_PLC_NO = p.PLC_NO JOIN REGION r ON p.PLC_RGN_CD = r.RGN_CD WHERE w.WISH_MBR_ID = #{mbrId} ORDER BY w.WISH_REG_DATE DESC
